name: Abrams Pickleball Courts - Rehoboth Beach Elementary School
description: Abrams Pickleball Courts - Rehoboth Beach Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rehoboth Beach, DE. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Play when school is not in session. In the summer, play is anytime after 7am and During School, After 4:30PM weekdays and open all weekend.
